headline: Japan Recovers Ninety Percent of Lithium From Spent Battery Mass
lede: A new chemical refinement process significantly improves the efficiency of battery recycling. By replacing sodium hydroxide with recovered lithium, researchers have successfully elevated recovery yields to ninety percent.

headline: Running CUDA Workloads on Non-Nvidia Hardware
lede: The development of the SCALE compiler aims to break the industry's reliance on proprietary vendor lock-in. By implementing a clean-room approach, the project seeks to enable near-native performance across diverse GPU architectures.

headline: Australia Mandates Three Hours of Free Midday Electricity
lede: Government mandates now require retailers to provide free energy windows during peak solar generation. This shift attempts to balance grid capacity while potentially complicating the economics for private rooftop solar owners.
pullquote: Policy mandates that leverage midday solar oversupply are fundamentally altering the economic landscape for household energy management.

headline: Streamlining Commit History With New Git Subcommands
lede: Recent updates introduce integrated tools for rebasing and splitting commits. These native functions replace manual operations with automated processes to maintain repository health.

headline: Researchers Build High-Resolution Atlas of Human Brainstem
lede: A new three-dimensional digital map provides granular insights into two hundred distinct cell clusters and pathways. This open-access resource offers clinicians a refined framework for investigating neurodegenerative diseases at the cellular level.

headline: JetBrains Releases YouTrackDB for Object-Oriented Graph Modeling
lede: The internal database engine powering production environments is now available for enterprise applications. It optimizes performance through direct link traversal and native support for complex graph query languages.

headline: Automating Apple App Builds Without Xcode
lede: A headless build workflow utilizes custom scripts and command-line tools to manage app distribution. This modular approach supports automated releases and integration with modern AI coding assistants.

headline: Revisiting The 2005 Fundamentals of Wireless Communication
lede: The foundational textbook by Tse and Viswanath remains a definitive resource for physical-layer theory. It bridges essential mathematical concepts with the architecture of modern wireless networks.

headline: Building A Custom Circular LCD Clock With Raspberry Pi
lede: This project integrates a circular seven-inch display with web-based interface software. Detailed power management and script configuration allow for a fully programmable kitchen-timer alternative.

headline: Government Login Portal Blocks Keyboard Input
lede: An over-engineered validation script in a national registration system prevents citizens from typing digits on specific keyboard layouts. The failure highlights the dangers of replacing native browser inputs with custom, restrictive JavaScript.
